title: My Opinion on Smartphones
prompt: Write about whether smartphones are good or bad for students. Give your opinion. (~130 words)
content:
I think smartphones are very good for students. They are a good tool for study. For example, I can use a smartphone to search information for homework. I can also learn English with some apps. This is very helpful.

But some people think smartphones are bad. They say students play games too much on the phone. This is a bad thing. Students can waste a lot of time. It can also be bad for your eyes. I think this is true sometimes.

In my opinion, smartphone is good if you use it for good things. We must be careful. It is very useful but we should not use it for long time. I think smartphone help me in many ways. It is a good invention.
